hooks.command: jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: "Pre-commit reminder (otel-libs): before finishing this commit, verify documentation matches the code change. Check: root README.md (env var table), root CHANGELOG.md (Unreleased entry), and the per-language HOW-TO.md under python/, go/, dotnet/ for any user-facing behavior touched by this commit. Update whichever are stale before committing."}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Checking documentation is up to date before commit...
